description: Lock proto-writing to source-backed Uruk-period administrative pictographic/proto-cuneiform notation, not generic archives or trade-route infrastructure.

checks.reason: Trade routes are broad commercial scaling context, not a source-backed direct prerequisite for the scoped proto-writing node.
Token/accounting record keeping remains the source-backed predecessor to proto-cuneiform pictographic notation.
The proto-writing node should stay anchored to the source-backed 3500-3000 BCE pictographic/proto-cuneiform phase, not the older token-accounting date.
